title: Lightweight
description: Boost your Minecraft experience with enhanced performance, smoother gameplay, and optimized efficiency.
body:
# Lightweight Optimization

Lightweight Optimization is a lightweight, performance-focused Minecraft modpack built to maximize FPS, reduce lag, and deliver a smoother gameplay experience while preserving the vanilla feel of Minecraft.

This modpack combines some of the best optimization mods available for Fabric, making it an excellent choice for both low-end and high-end systems.

## Features

- Significantly improved FPS and overall performance
- Reduced memory usage and faster chunk loading
- Enhanced multiplayer and server performance
- OptiFine-like features without sacrificing performance
- Minimal impact on vanilla gameplay and visuals
- Regular updates for the latest Minecraft versions

## Included Technologies

Lightweight Optimization includes industry-standard performance mods such as:

- Sodium
- Lithium
- FerriteCore
- ImmediatelyFast
- Entity Culling
- More Culling
- Krypton
- ThreadTweak
- Iris Shaders
- Sodium Extra

and many other carefully selected optimization and quality-of-life enhancements.

## OptiFine Features Included

While Lightweight Optimization is built around Sodium, many popular OptiFine features are still available through modern alternatives:

- Shader support via Iris
- Dynamic Lights
- Connected Textures
- Improved graphics customization
- Enhanced performance compared to traditional OptiFine setups

## Built on Fabric

Fabric provides one of the fastest and most lightweight modding platforms available. By leveraging Fabric's extensive optimization ecosystem, Lightweight Optimization delivers exceptional performance without unnecessary bloat.

## Works Everywhere

Lightweight Optimization works seamlessly in:

- Singleplayer worlds
- Multiplayer servers
- Survival gameplay
- Creative building
- PvP environments

No server-side installation is required for most features.

## Performance First

Whether you're exploring vast worlds, building large projects, or using shaders, Lightweight Optimization is designed to provide a smoother and more responsive Minecraft experience.
